headline: 5 Solid Dividend Stocks to Buy in July
summary: Yield above 4% sounds appealing until you realize most high-payout stocks are traps waiting to spring. These five names span life insurance, asset management, banking, and consumer staples, and each one earns its dividend rather than just promising it.

raw.headline: 5 Solid Dividend Stocks to Buy in July
raw.summary: Yield above 4% sounds appealing until you realize most high-payout stocks are traps waiting to spring. These five names span life insurance, asset management, banking, and consumer staples, and each one earns its dividend rather than just promising it.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on T. Rowe Price Group, Raises Price Target to $121
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Glenn Schorr   maintains T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $111 to $121.

headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Market Perform on T. Rowe Price Group, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Alex Bond   maintains T. Rowe Price Group (NASDAQ:TROW) with a Market Perform and raises the price target from $107 to $120.
